name: Raised By The Strongest! (And Utahime)
description:
“So, you guys know how to raise the kid of a guy you just murdered?”

“Nah.”

“Why would we know that Satoru?”

You take place of Megumi in this scenario, you’re pretty much just getting raised by three idiots. Satoru Gojo, Suguru Geto, and Shoko Ieiri. (And Utahime Iori)
creator: SD-S
